lg.$description: Border radius for large input form container - 8px

md.$description: Border radius for medium input form container - 8px

sm.$description: Border radius for small input form container - 6px

xs.$description: Border radius for extra small input form container - 4px

2xs.$description: Border radius for 2xs input form container - 4px

3xs.$description: Border radius for 3xs input form container - 4px (smallest size)

width.$description: Default border width for input form container - typically 1px

lg.$description: Height of large input form container - 44px

md.$description: Height of medium input form container - 40px

sm.$description: Height of small input form container - 36px

xs.$description: Height of extra small input form container - 32px

3xs.$description: Height of 3xs input form container - 24px (smallest size)

min-width.$description: Minimum width for input form to ensure usability - 80px

lg.$description: Gap between label, input, and hint text for large size - 4px

md.$description: Gap between label, input, and hint text for medium size - 4px

sm.$description: Gap between label, input, and hint text for small size - 4px

xs.$description: Gap between label, input, and hint text for xs size - 4px

2xs.$description: Gap between label, input, and hint text for 2xs size - 4px

3xs.$description: Gap between label, input, and hint text for 3xs size - 4px

lg.$description: Typography for input text in large form - Regular 16px

md.$description: Typography for input text in medium form - Regular 16px

sm.$description: Typography for input text in small form - Regular 14px

xs.$description: Typography for input text in xs form - Regular 13px

2xs.$description: Typography for input text in 2xs form - Regular 12px

3xs.$description: Typography for input text in 3xs form - Regular 11px (smallest)

default.$description: Default neutral background color for input form

disabled.$description: Background color when input form is disabled

default.$description: Default border color for neutral state

hover.$description: Border color on hover for neutral state

focused.$description: Border color when input is focused (primary color)

disabled.$description: Border color when input is disabled

default.$description: Default text color for input value

placeholder.$description: Placeholder text color (lighter than default text)

disabled.$description: Text color when input is disabled

ring.$description: Focus ring color for neutral state (primary accent)

default.$description: Background color for success state (keeps neutral base)

disabled.$description: Background color when success input is disabled

hover.$description: Success border color on hover (darker green)

default.$description: Text color in success state (neutral text)

disabled.$description: Text color when success input is disabled

ring.$description: Focus ring color for success state (light green)

default.$description: Background color for error state (keeps neutral base)

disabled.$description: Background color when error input is disabled

hover.$description: Error border color on hover (darker red)

default.$description: Text color in error state (neutral text)

disabled.$description: Text color when error input is disabled

ring.$description: Focus ring color for error state (light red)

default.$description: Background color for warning state (keeps neutral base)

disabled.$description: Background color when warning input is disabled

hover.$description: Warning border color on hover (darker orange)

default.$description: Text color in warning state (neutral text)

disabled.$description: Text color when warning input is disabled

ring.$description: Focus ring color for warning state (light orange)

lg.$description: Label typography for large form - Medium 16px/20px (as per Figma: Inter Medium 14px)

md.$description: Label typography for medium form - Medium 16px/20px (as per Figma: Inter Medium 14px)

sm.$description: Label typography for small form - Medium 14px/20px (as per Figma: Inter Medium 14px)

xs.$description: Label typography for xs form - Medium 13px (as per Figma: Inter Medium 14px)

2xs.$description: Label typography for 2xs form - Medium 12px (as per Figma: Inter Medium 14px)

3xs.$description: Label typography for 3xs form - Medium 11px (smallest, as per Figma: Inter Medium 14px)

disabled.$description: Label text color when form is disabled

bottom.$description: Space between label and input field - 4px

lg.$description: Helper text typography for large form - Regular 14px/18px (as per Figma: 13px/18px)

md.$description: Helper text typography for medium form - Regular 14px/18px (as per Figma: 13px/18px)

sm.$description: Helper text typography for small form - Regular 13px/18px (as per Figma: 13px/18px)

xs.$description: Helper text typography for xs form - Regular 12px (as per Figma: 13px/18px)

2xs.$description: Helper text typography for 2xs form - Regular 11px (as per Figma: 13px/18px)

3xs.$description: Helper text typography for 3xs form - Regular 10px (smallest, as per Figma: 13px/18px)

neutral.$description: Helper text color for neutral state - #475467 (gray.600)

success.$description: Helper text color for success state (green)

error.$description: Helper text color for error state (red)

warning.$description: Helper text color for warning state (orange)

disabled.$description: Helper text color when form is disabled

top.$description: Space between input field and helper text below - 4px

lg.$description: Action button typography for large form - Semibold 16px (as per Figma: Semibold 16px/24px)

md.$description: Action button typography for medium form - Semibold 14px (as per Figma: Semibold 14px/20px)

sm.$description: Action button typography for small form - Semibold 14px (as per Figma: Semibold 14px/20px)

xs.$description: Action button typography for xs form - Semibold 13px (as per Figma: Semibold 14px/20px)

2xs.$description: Action button typography for 2xs form - Semibold 12px (as per Figma: Semibold 14px/20px)

3xs.$description: Action button typography for 3xs form - Semibold 11px (smallest, as per Figma: Semibold 14px/20px)

primary.$description: Action button text color - Primary blue #004EEB

neutral.$description: Action button text color for neutral variant

left.$description: Space on the left side of action button when in label row - 4px to 8px based on size
